patterns.title: The AEO triangle — presence, relevance, manual-action propagation
Agent-first GTM (rebuild, don't bolt-on)
Agents are first-class users — design for output, not navigation
Agents mapped 1:1 to JTBD with named human checkpoints
Build for the next model, not the current one
Context, not capability, is the bottleneck
Diagnose before executing — refuse the playbook ask
Differentiation requires three checks — different, better, matters
Distribution and earned channels are the new moat
The Economic Turing Test — outcomes pricing, agent labor, revenue per employee
Evals are data analysis — single judge, binary rubrics, error analysis first
Frontline customer contact is the PMM substrate
Generalists with taste, shipping end-to-end
LLM-as-OS, post-training as moat
Make the implicit explicit
Measure with absolute counts and correlated short signals, not stage rates and long loops
Company story IS the strategy — name the shift, run the audit
Repair, generous interpretation, identity-vs-behavior — parenting frames as leadership ops
Principal/staff IC as force-multiplier archetype
Quality and friction-as-feature are growth levers, not constraints
Research preview, frontier programs, seasons not roadmaps
Specificity becomes profitable — long tail, niche, segment-aware pricing
Status quo / no-decision is the real competitor
Substrate runs the loop; humans run alignment and taste
